name: TRENDnet Gigabit PoE++ Injector, Convert A Non-PoE Port To A PoE++ Gigabit Port, PoE (15.4W), PoE+ (30W), Or PoE++ (95W), Up to 100m (328 ft), Integrated Power Supply, Black, TPE-119GI
shortName: TRENDnet Gigabit PoE++ Injector, Convert A Non-PoE Port To A PoE++
description: Gigabit PoE injector that converts non-PoE ports to PoE++, supporting up to 95W power delivery over 100m.
